rows.notes: Top-of-page running heading. Handwriting slightly stylised ('Arrearagia' could be 'Arrearages') but clearly a section title; no amounts visible in the row.

Right-hand three columns align clearly. Pounds '8' and shillings '12' are distinct. Pence column shows '0' with a trailing '3/4' stroke interpreted as three farthings (0.75). Small ambiguity in place-name spelling ('Bensington' readable but not certain).
Description legible. Numeric columns clearly aligned: pounds '3', shillings '0', pence '5' with a small 'ob' style mark interpreted as halfpenny (0.5).

Pounds '22' and shillings '1' are clear. Pence digits are faint/blurred; read as '7' based on alignment with the pence column but could plausibly be '1' or another single digit — chosen '7' as the best visual match. No fraction symbol visible.
Short place-name or subsection heading centered under previous entries. No amounts on this line; lettering is relatively clear.
Numbers very clear and well aligned: pounds '20', shillings '10', pence '3'. Description and '2 yrs' annotation legible.

Pounds '10' and shillings '14' clear. Pence appears as '1' with a small 'ob' style mark interpreted as a halfpenny (0.5). Slight uncertainty from faint halfpenny stroke but alignment supports reading.
Pounds column shows a clear '0' (empty/zero), shillings '10', pence '10' all aligned; description 'Storns.' is somewhat abbreviated but readable. No fraction sign.

Pounds '2' and shillings '0' clear. Pence '2' followed by a three-quarter mark (looks like '3q' or '3/4') interpreted as three farthings (0.75). Small ink smudge near fraction reduces confidence slightly.
Numeric columns very clear: pounds '23', shillings '12', pence '5'. Description 'Kimber.' legible. Values pass currency ranges.

Pounds '25' and shillings '16' read clearly. Pence column shows '0' with a small 'q' or farthing sign interpreted as one farthing (0.25). The parenthetical place spelling is slightly uncertain ('Worby' or similar).

rows.description: Stipend or Quit-Rent for Kidlington Vicarage vid. am. pro 2nd Dec. Nov. 1810 mem †
rows.notes: Long explanatory entry with no amounts in this row. Handwriting of the legal/date annotation is fairly clear though abbreviated; treated as an entry (substantive note) rather than a numeric total or header.
